name: appdev-suite
description: Six senior-level app-development craft skills: taste (aesthetic/editorial judgment), ui-ux-pro-max (UI/UX design), frontend-engineering (HTML/CSS/JS/TS/React), dotnet-engineering (C#/ASP.NET Core), devops-platform-engineering (CI/CD, IaC, Kubernetes, AWS/Azure), and kotlin-multiplatform (professional iOS + Android from shared KMP code). Skills auto-load when a task matches their description.
